mapper.sql: A.SUSER_ID as suserId , A.SUSER_NM AS suserNm , A.SUSER_TYPE_CD AS suserTypeCd , A.DUSER_REG_DATE AS duserRegDate , A.SUSER_TEL_NO AS suserTelNo , A.SUSER_FAX_NO AS suserFaxNo , A.SUSER_MPHON_NO AS suserMphonNo , A.NLOGIN_FAIL_TMSCNT AS nloginFailTmscnt , A.SCHR_MSG_RCV_YN AS schrMsgRcvYn , A.SMPHON_OTTP_YN AS smphonOttpYn , A.SUSER_STTUS_CD AS suserSttusCd , A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID AS sposDeptOrgId , A.SDIBEL_UCLS_USER_ID AS sdibelUclsUserId , A.SKT_TKCG_USER_ID AS sktTkcgUserId , A.SUSER_RMARK AS suserRmark , A.SOLD_USER_ID AS soldUserId , A.SIPMS_CONN_YN AS sipms_connYn , A.DCREATE_DT AS dcreateDt , A.SCREATE_ID AS screateId , A.DMODIFY_DT AS dmodifyDt , A.SMODIFY_ID AS smodifyId , (CASE WHEN STRPOS( A.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR,'@') >4 THEN SUBSTRING (SPLIT_PART(A.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR,'@' ,1 ),0 ,LENGTH(SPLIT_PART(A.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR,'@' ,1 ))-2 ) || '***@' || SPLIT_PART(A.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR,'@' ,2 ) ELSE SUBSTRING (SPLIT_PART(A.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR,'@' ,1 ),0 ,LENGTH(SPLIT_PART(A.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR,'@' ,1 )) ) || '*@' || SPLIT_PART(A.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR,'@' ,2 )END ) AS suserEmailAdr

, B.SUSER_STTUS_NM AS suserSttusNm , (CASE WHEN C.SUSER_GRADE_NM IS NULL THEN '조회자' ELSE C.SUSER_GRADE_NM END ) AS suserGradeNm , D.SORG_NM AS sposDeptOrgNm , E.SUSER_NM AS sdibelUclsUserNm , F.SUSER_NM AS sktTkcgUserNm ,(SELECT STRING_AGG(SORG_NM,'-') FROM (SELECT SORG_NM FROM MST.TB_ORG_BAS AS G START WITH G.SKT_ORG_ID = A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID CONNECT BY G.SKT_ORG_ID = PRIOR G.SUP_KT_ORG_ID ORDER BY G.SORG_PREF_ODRG) ) AS sposDeptFullNm , NVL (G.SUSER_GRADE_CD ,'UR0006') AS suserGradeCd , (CASE WHEN G.SUSER_GRADE_CD IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS sipmsUserYn
, MST.TB_USER_STTUS_CD B , MST.TB_USER_GRADE_CD C , MST.TB_ORG_BAS D , MST.TB_USER_BAS E , MST.TB_USER_BAS F , (SELECT DISTINCT SUSER_ID ,SUSER_GRADE_CD FROM MST.TB_USER_AUTH_TXN) G

AND A.SUSER_STTUS_CD = B.SUSER_STTUS_CD(+) AND A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID = D.SKT_ORG_ID(+) AND A.SDIBEL_UCLS_USER_ID = E.SUSER_ID(+) AND A.SKT_TKCG_USER_ID = F.SUSER_ID(+) AND A.SUSER_ID = G.SUSER_ID(+) AND G.SUSER_GRADE_CD = C.SUSER_GRADE_CD(+)
